economic_notes: Investments in multiple limited partnerships and government business enterprises including Shxw Kwimel Cha Limited Partnership (99%), Ts'elxweyeqw Tribe Limited Partnership (14%), Centre Creek Limited Partnership (11%), Ch-ihl-kway-uhk Forestry Limited Partnership (13%). Skynest Limited Partnership (10%) was held in 2022 but not 2023. Portfolio investments managed by Connor Clark & Lunn Private Capital Ltd and Leith Wheeler Investment Counsel Ltd.
notes: Fiscal year ends March 31, 2023 (not 2024). Property Taxation department is the only consolidated subsidiary. Five business partnerships accounted for using modified equity method (GBEs). No schedule of remuneration included in the document. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $2,881,555 + Other government transfers per segment schedule $1,216,143 = $4,097,698. OSR calculated as total revenue $17,125,384 minus total government transfers $4,097,698 = $13,027,686. Accumulated remeasurement losses of $387,612 recognized in 2023 due to adoption of PS 3450 Financial Instruments. Annual debt service reflects only repayment of long-term debt ($132,654); new borrowings of $1,196,420 also occurred. Skynest Limited Partnership (10%) was held in 2022 but disposed of by 2023.
